title: Device Translation Table Library
text: Device Translation Table Library Use this editor to define or modify a device translation table. The device translation tables supplied with Uniface are in the USYS library. During installation, compiled versions of these tables are placed in USYS:usys.uar . Note: You must import libdvc.usys.xml from the /uniface/misc directory of your installation before you can copy or modify translation tables. Fields Description Definition How to Define a New Translation Table Related Links Device Translation Tables Device translation tables handle output to screens and printers. They map Uniface logical functions onto device functions, making it possible for Uniface to support a wide variety of hardware platforms, including their output devices. Was this topic helpful?
